STT 1, 004 [Enuma Eliš 4][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] ⸢ru?-bu?⸣-[u₂]-ti

[...] of rulership,

o 22

[... a]-na ma-li-⸢ku-ti⸣ ir-mu!(BI)

[...] he (Marduk) took up residence [...] for sovereignty.

o 33

[...] ⸢i-na⸣ DINGIR.DINGIR GAL.GAL

(The gods said to Marduk:) '[...] among the great gods,

o 44

[... si₃-qar]-ka d⸢a⸣-nu-um

'[...], your [speech] is Anu.

o 55

[...] ⸢DINGIR⸣.DINGIR GAL.GAL

'[...] the great gods,

o 66

[... si₃-qar]-⸢ka⸣ da-nu-um

'[...], your [speech] is Anu.

o 77

[... qi₂]-⸢bit⸣-ka

'[...] your command [...],

o 88

[...] ⸢ši-i lu⸣-u₂ ŠU-ka

'[...], may that be your power.

o 99

[... la] ⸢ša₂-na-an si₃⸣-qar-ka

'[...], may your speech be unrivalled,

o 1010

[... it]-⸢ti⸣-iq

'[...] cross [...].

o 1111

[... DINGIR.DINGIR]-ma

'[... of the gods],

o 1212

[... aš₂-ruk]-⸢ka⸣

'[...], [...] your [place ...].

o 1313

[... mu-ter-ru gi-mil-li]-⸢ni⸣

'[...] our [avenger],

(rest of obverse missing)
